message:
fix(runtime): detect permit ID reuse in bulkhead and preserve operations on failed release

bulkhead.rs:
- Add BULKHEAD_PERMIT_ID_REUSED error code and PermitIdReused variant
- Check for existing permit ID BEFORE inserting new permit — reject with
  structured error containing both existing and requested operation IDs
- Move next_permit_seq increment AFTER successful insert to prevent
  sequence advancement on collision
- Add test: reused_generated_permit_id_is_rejected_without_overwriting

lane_router.rs:
- Change complete_operation() to use .get().cloned() instead of .remove()
  before calling bulkhead.release() — if release fails, the active
  operation entry is preserved for recovery rather than being silently lost
- Only call self.active.remove() AFTER successful bulkhead release
- Map BulkheadError::PermitIdReused to LaneRouterError::InvalidConfig
- Add test: completion_failure_preserves_active_operation_until_repaired

saga.rs:
- Update MAX_SAGAS doc comment to reflect terminal-only reclamation
  semantics instead of generic "oldest evicted" language
- Add error doc for ID reuse case in create_saga()

proof_scheduler.rs:
- Extend proof scheduler with additional capacity boundary test coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
